skills.name: kata-setup
skills.description: Bootstrap Kata into Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Pi, or generic Skills environments. Use this whenever the user asks to install Kata, set it up, connect the CLI, or configure a harness.
skills.setupHint: Run `npx @kata-sh/cli setup --pi` for Pi harnesses (or `npx @kata-sh/cli setup` for generic detection), then run `npx @kata-sh/cli doctor` before execution.

skills.name: kata-new-project
skills.description: Create a new Kata project interview and seed milestones. Use this whenever the user wants to start a project with Kata.
skills.setupHint: Run `npx @kata-sh/cli setup --pi` once in Pi environments, then verify runtime health with `npx @kata-sh/cli doctor`.

skills.name: kata-discuss-phase
skills.description: Discuss a Kata phase before planning. Use this when the user wants to lock decisions before the plan.
skills.setupHint: Run `npx @kata-sh/cli setup --pi` once in Pi environments, then verify runtime health with `npx @kata-sh/cli doctor`.

skills.name: kata-plan-phase
skills.description: Plan a Kata phase against the canonical backend contract. Use this whenever the user asks Kata to plan the next slice of work.
skills.setupHint: Run `npx @kata-sh/cli setup --pi` once in Pi environments, then verify runtime health with `npx @kata-sh/cli doctor`.

skills.name: kata-execute-phase
skills.description: Execute a planned Kata phase task-by-task. Use this when the user wants Kata to carry out the plan.
skills.setupHint: Run `npx @kata-sh/cli setup --pi` once in Pi environments, then verify runtime health with `npx @kata-sh/cli doctor`.

skills.name: kata-verify-work
skills.description: Verify completed Kata work through explicit UAT and checks. Use this when the user asks to validate the work.
skills.setupHint: Run `npx @kata-sh/cli setup --pi` once in Pi environments, then verify runtime health with `npx @kata-sh/cli doctor`.

skills.name: kata-quick
skills.description: Run a short-form Kata task without the full milestone ceremony. Use this for focused one-off work.
skills.setupHint: Run `npx @kata-sh/cli setup --pi` once in Pi environments, then verify runtime health with `npx @kata-sh/cli doctor`.

skills.name: kata-progress
skills.description: Summarize live Kata progress against milestone and slice state. Use this when the user asks for project status.
skills.setupHint: Run `npx @kata-sh/cli setup --pi` once in Pi environments, then verify runtime health with `npx @kata-sh/cli doctor`.

skills.name: kata-health
skills.description: Run Kata health diagnostics for the active backend and workflow runtime. Use this when the user asks whether Kata is configured correctly.
skills.setupHint: Run `npx @kata-sh/cli setup --pi` once in Pi environments, then verify runtime health with `npx @kata-sh/cli doctor`.
